titleStmt.title: SII 7.288: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 288. (A.R. No. 104 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatāyē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . tra
yilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya
śakavaruṣa 1351 saṁ kīlakasaṁvatsarada Āśvija sudha 1 Adivāradalu śrī
ma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bāṣegetappuvarāya
ragaṁḍa pūrvva paścima Uttara dakṣiṇa nālku catusamudrādhipati śrīvīrapratāpa dē
varāyamahārāyaru sakaḷasāṁbrājyavanu yēkachatradiṁ Āḷuva kāladalli
Ā dēvarāyamahārāyara nirūpadiṁ narasiṁhvavaḍeyaru bārakū
rarājyavanu pratipālisu kāladali Odevūru dadēvara bīḍu dēva ke bā
ḷu cetravaḷiya dettikallakaḷiya bāḷanu vīrabhadradēvara mūḍi
dhyaru hadinēḷokkalu brāṁhmarige nāyaru mūlavāgi
maneya vivara paḍuvaṇa kōḍina madhyadiṁda teṁkalu yiṁda pa
ḍuvalu teṁkalu dattikalliṁda baḍagala na ligara teṁka na
kalliṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme Oḷaguḷa bāḷanu kēsabāhiriya
ḍaṇa vōṇiyiṁda ba 30 lkeda mū 10 kke huḍe sighaḷibāhiriyiṁda ba
30 lkeda mū 10 kke Akki sale nāraṁṇabāhiriyiṁda ba 30 lkeda mū 10
goṁda bāhirige ba 30 lkeda mū 10 sāvaṁtrighaḷige ba 30 lkeda mū 10
koraḷi tima bāhiyara ba 30 lkeda mū 10 mūḍamaneya Aṁṇabāhirige
baḷa 30 mū 10 yiṁdrāṇi bādhyamarināyaniṁda ba 30 lkeda mū 10
turabinaUṁṇyaṁṇiniṁda ba 30 lkeda mū 10 rāmaviṣṇugōyiṁdage
bāḷeraḍu ba 30 lkeda mū 20 kriṣṇamaṭṭināyaniṁda ba 30 lkeda mū 10 turu
bina rāma turubina siva turubina Uṁṇyaṁṇa Aṁtu bāḷera
ḍu ba 30 lkeda mū 20 rāmabāhiri Aṁṇage bāḷu Akki ba 30 lkeda mū 5 sōvaṁ
ṇa bāhiriya maḷige bāḷu Akki ba 30 lkeda mū 5 sivabāhiriya Uṁṇyaṁṇa
ge bāḷu Aki ba 30 lkeda mū 5 gaUri māṇirāmaṁge bāḷu Akki ba 30 lkeda mū
5 nāraṁṇage ba 30 lkeda mū 10 viṣṇubāhiriya maga gōyiṁdarige ba
30 lkeda mū 10 yi hadinēḷokkalu brāhmaru nāyaru mūlavāgi koṁḍa vīrabha
dradēvara dēvasvavanū baru kālakālakke Akki ba 30 lkeda mū 62 Akki naḍasiba
haru vīrabhadradēvara pādamūli maṭhādige tettubaharu yī hadinēḷu brāṁhma
rige yeraḍu bāḷada nāḍa variṣasēri ba 3 ge Akki mū lekhada mūla
nereya salladu namma muḍidakke hā
The next seven lines are completely damaged.lladu Aki mū 5 vruttiyu sarvvamāṁnyavāgi
Digital edition of SII 7.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
